feed.title: CR Labs — Learn
feed.subtitle: Clear explainers on how modern AI works.

entry.title: AI Infrastructure Careers: MLOps, ML Systems & Data Engineering | CR Labs
entry.summary: Inference is 70-80% of AI compute spend. The engineers who make models run cheaply at scale, what they do, and what they earn.

entry.title: AI Security Careers: Red Teaming, Evals & Safety Research | CR Labs
entry.summary: AI red teaming is the hardest hire in security, about 3 roles per qualified person. The AI safety roles, the demand, the pay, and how to get in.

entry.title: How to Choose Your AI Career Path (2026) | CR Labs
entry.summary: Pick an AI role by starting from the skills you already have. A practical guide to matching yourself to the right AI career track.

entry.title: AI Careers Explained: 13 Roles That Build Modern AI (2026) | CR Labs
entry.summary: "I want to work in AI" is really a dozen jobs. A plain-English map of the five tiers and thirteen roles that build modern AI, what they pay, and how to break in.

entry.title: Research Scientist vs Applied Scientist vs Research Engineer | CR Labs
entry.summary: Three AI research roles people mix up: what each does, what they pay (including the no-PhD path to $500K+), and how to break into each.

entry.title: ML Engineer vs AI Engineer vs Agentic AI Developer | CR Labs
entry.summary: The three roles that build most AI products, the real difference between them, pay bands, and which to start with in 2026.

entry.title: AI Learning Paths: 13 Role-by-Role Roadmaps Into AI | CR Labs
entry.summary: Thirteen role-specific learning paths into AI. For each: a course to start, a program to go deep, a portfolio project, and a realistic way in.

entry.title: Inside a Large Language Model | CR Labs
entry.summary: A field guide to how modern AI systems are built, trained, shrunk, and run: parameters, pre-training, post-training, parameter-efficient methods, quantization, retrieval, and inference, and how each stage maps to real hardware and real cost.
